---
title: "How to Publish Your Living Meta-Analysis on AMORE"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="wizard-container">
  <div class="wizard-nav">
    <div class="nav-header">
      AMORE Workflow
    </div>
    <ul class="step-list" role="tablist" aria-label="Workflow steps">
      <li class="step-item active" data-step="1" role="tab" tabindex="0" aria-selected="true" aria-controls="step1">
        <span class="step-number">1</span>
        <span class="step-text">Propose Your Topic</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="2" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step2">
        <span class="step-number">2</span>
        <span class="step-text">Steering Committee Review</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="3" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step3">
        <span class="step-number">3</span>
        <span class="step-text">Pre-registration</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="4" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step4">
        <span class="step-number">4</span>
        <span class="step-text">Conduct Review</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="5" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step5">
        <span class="step-number">5</span>
        <span class="step-text">Data Deposit</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="6" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step6">
        <span class="step-number">6</span>
        <span class="step-text">Publication</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="7" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step7">
        <span class="step-number">7</span>
        <span class="step-text">Regular Updates</span>
      </li>
      <li class="step-item" data-step="8" role="tab" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="step8">
        <span class="step-number">8</span>
        <span class="step-text">Provide Feedback</span>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="wizard-content">
    <!-- Progress bar -->
    <div class="wizard-progress-bar">
      <div class="wizard-progress-fill" style="width: 12.5%;"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step counter -->
    <div class="step-meta">
      <span class="step-counter">Step <span class="current-step-num">1</span> of 8</span>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 1: Propose Your Topic -->
    <div class="step-content active" id="step1" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Propose Your Topic</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Contact Us</h3>
        <p>
          Interested in publishing your living meta-analysis on AMORE? Reach out through our
          <a href="contact.html">contact form</a> -- there is no commitment required. We are
          happy to answer questions about the standardization framework, analysis requirements,
          or protocol preparation.
        </p>
        <h3>What to Include in Your Proposal</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>A meta-analysis investigating oxytocin related to a biobehavioral outcome</li>
          <li>A proposed update frequency (maximum 24 months between updates)</li>
          <li>A draft protocol aligned with our standardization framework -- see the
            <a href="Resources.html">checklist on the Resources page</a> for required elements</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="step-cta">
          <a href="contact.html" class="primary-button">Submit a Proposal</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 2: Steering Committee Review -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step2" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Steering Committee Review</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Review Process</h3>
        <p>
          Your proposal is reviewed by the AMORE steering committee, a panel of experts in
          oxytocin research methodology. The committee evaluates feasibility, scope, and
          adherence to platform standards.
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>Confirmation that the topic falls within the platform's remit</li>
          <li>Verification that all mandatory checklist requirements are met</li>
          <li>Methodological feedback and guidance where needed</li>
        </ul>
        <p class="step-note">
          Typical review turnaround: 2–4 weeks.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 3: Pre-registration -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step3" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Pre-registration</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Registration Requirements</h3>
        <p>
          Before conducting the review, you must pre-register your protocol in a recognized
          repository. Pre-registration ensures transparency and protects against post-hoc
          analytical decisions.
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>Register in a recognized repository such as the
            <a href="https://osf.io/" target="_blank">Open Science Framework</a> or
            <a href="https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/prospero/" target="_blank">PROSPERO</a></li>
          <li>Include your full search strategy, inclusion/exclusion criteria, and planned analyses</li>
          <li>Once registered, your project will receive its own page on the AMORE platform</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 4: Conduct Review -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step4" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Conduct Review</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Perform Systematic Review</h3>
        <p>
          With your protocol pre-registered, you can begin the systematic review. Adherence
          to the registered protocol is essential; any deviations must be documented.
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>Conduct the review based on your pre-registered protocol</li>
          <li>All analyses must be performed using free software to ensure reproducibility</li>
          <li>Track any deviations from the protocol and document them in a deviation report</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 5: Data Deposit -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step5" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Data Deposit</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Data Requirements</h3>
        <p>
          Open data is a cornerstone of the AMORE framework. All materials must be deposited
          in publicly accessible repositories before publication.
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>Deposit the complete dataset in a recognized repository (e.g. Open Science Framework or Zenodo)</li>
          <li>Deposit the analysis script in a recognized repository</li>
          <li>Include the deviation report as supplementary material alongside the analysis script</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 6: Publication -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step6" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Publication</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Publication Process</h3>
        <p>
          AMORE encourages rapid dissemination. Publish a pre-print before or alongside
          journal submission so the community can access your findings immediately.
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>Publish the manuscript on a recognized pre-print server (e.g., Open Science Framework)</li>
          <li>Submit to a peer-reviewed journal</li>
          <li>Your AMORE project page will be updated with links to the pre-print, published paper, and deviation report</li>
          <li>Ensure all documentation remains publicly accessible</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 7: Regular Updates -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step7" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Regular Updates</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Update Requirements</h3>
        <p>
          The defining feature of a living meta-analysis is its ongoing updates. You are
          responsible for conducting new searches according to your registered schedule.
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>Conduct new searches according to your update plan (maximum 24 months between updates)</li>
          <li>For each update: document all changes, remove any retracted papers, and update all relevant materials</li>
          <li>Maintain public accessibility of all documents</li>
          <li>Follow the original protocol for consistency across updates</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 8: Provide Feedback -->
    <div class="step-content" id="step8" role="tabpanel">
      <h2>Provide Feedback</h2>
      <div class="content-box">
        <h3>Help Us Improve</h3>
        <p>
          Your experience publishing on AMORE is valuable! We welcome feedback on:
        </p>
        <ul>
          <li>The publication workflow and process</li>
          <li>Platform functionality and user experience</li>
          <li>Documentation and guidance clarity</li>
          <li>Thoughts on the standardised framework</li>
          <li>Any challenges you encountered</li>
        </ul>
        <p>
          Your input helps us continuously improve AMORE for the research community.
        </p>
        <div class="step-cta">
          <a href="contact.html#feedback-form" class="primary-button">
            Share Your Feedback
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="wizard-navigation">
      <button class="nav-button prev-button" aria-label="Previous step" disabled>Previous</button>
      <button class="nav-button next-button" aria-label="Next step">Next</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    var stepItems = document.querySelectorAll('.step-item');
    var stepContents = document.querySelectorAll('.step-content');
    var prevButton = document.querySelector('.prev-button');
    var nextButton = document.querySelector('.next-button');
    var progressFill = document.querySelector('.wizard-progress-fill');
    var stepNumDisplay = document.querySelector('.current-step-num');
    var currentStep = 1;

    function setActiveStep(stepNumber) {
        // Update navigation items (active + completed states + ARIA)
        stepItems.forEach(function(item) {
            var num = parseInt(item.dataset.step);
            var isActive = num === stepNumber;
            var isCompleted = num < stepNumber;

            item.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
            item.classList.toggle('completed', isCompleted);
            item.setAttribute('aria-selected', isActive ? 'true' : 'false');
            item.setAttribute('tabindex', isActive ? '0' : '-1');
        });

        // Update content sections
        stepContents.forEach(function(content) {
            if (content.id === 'step' + stepNumber) {
                content.classList.add('active');
            } else {
                content.classList.remove('active');
            }
        });

        // Update progress bar
        var percent = (stepNumber / 8) * 100;
        progressFill.style.width = percent + '%';

        // Update step counter
        stepNumDisplay.textContent = stepNumber;

        // Update button states
        prevButton.disabled = stepNumber === 1;
        nextButton.disabled = stepNumber === 8;

        currentStep = stepNumber;
    }

    // Click handlers for step items
    stepItems.forEach(function(item) {
        item.addEventListener('click', function() {
            setActiveStep(parseInt(item.dataset.step));
        });
    });

    // Keyboard navigation for step items
    stepItems.forEach(function(item) {
        item.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
                e.preventDefault();
                setActiveStep(parseInt(item.dataset.step));
            }
            if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
                e.preventDefault();
                var next = item.nextElementSibling;
                if (next) { next.focus(); }
            }
            if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
                e.preventDefault();
                var prev = item.previousElementSibling;
                if (prev) { prev.focus(); }
            }
        });
    });

    // Navigation buttons
    prevButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
        if (currentStep > 1) { setActiveStep(currentStep - 1); }
    });

    nextButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
        if (currentStep < 8) { setActiveStep(currentStep + 1); }
    });

    // Initialize
    setActiveStep(1);
});
</script>
```
